description_long: This filing cabinet is a tall, rectangular structure with a metallic appearance, featuring a boxy top section that houses two vertical, rectangular protrusions resembling drawers or compartments. The main body is a solid column, with a slightly darker band separating the top section from the shaft. The top compartment is recessed, with the two drawer-like elements rising from within, each with a flat front and no visible handles or label holders. The overall color scheme is a gradient of grays, giving it a modern, industrial look. The cabinet appears robust and functional, suitable for storing documents or tools in an urban environment.
description: A tall, metallic filing cabinet with a recessed top section and two vertical, handle-less drawers. The design is modern and industrial, with a gradient gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow face of the cabinet with the two vertical drawers aligned side by side in the recessed top section.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full width of the cabinet and the depth of the recessed top, with both drawers visible and separated by a central gap.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the narrow face and the tops of the two drawers, but with less detail on the drawer fronts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again displays the cabinet's width and the two vertical drawers, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
